# RaBe Universal Base Image 10 Minimal

The RaBe Universal Base Image 10 Minimal is a stripped-down container base image
built on AlmaLinux 10 UBI10 minimal. It pre-installs the RaBe Root CA trust anchor
so that downstream images inherit it automatically. Use it as a FROM base for any
RaBe container image that needs a modern, lifecycle-managed EL10 foundation.


## Documentation

- [README](https://radiorabe.github.io/container-image-ubi10-minimal/index.md)

## Monitoring

- [Monitoring](https://radiorabe.github.io/container-image-ubi10-minimal/monitoring/index.md)
